request.title: World #15363191
request.negative_text: cartoon, anime, low poly, video game, neon nightclub, magenta walls, pink walls, oak paneling, bright daylight, clutter, text, logo, blurry
request.prompt: Cinematic photoreal interior 360 panorama. Private studio of a creative-director couple the lounge of a Manhattan brownstone reimagined for 2049. Mid-century modern furniture in deep cognac leather, dark walnut, polished brass, and Carrara marble. Low Eames-style lounge chair and ottoman. Rich indigo velvet sofa. Brass and walnut coffee table with a leather-bound magazine open on it. Tall floor-to-ceiling window on one wall with sheer linen curtains parted to reveal a distant misty futurist city skyline at dusk (subtle, atmospheric, not the focus). Large flat-panel television mounted in a brass-framed recessed wall on the left. Floor-to-ceiling built-in bookshelf with leather-bound books, a brass globe, and small art objects on the back wall. A tall arched doorway on the right with warm light spilling through from the next room. Walls in deep midnight indigo and soft charcoal. Brass picture lights, a single warm Edison-bulb floor lamp, and faint cool moonlight from the window. Restrained, sophisticated, expensive. Subtle dust motes in volumetric light. Photorealistic, shot on Arri Alexa 65, anamorphic, cinematic color grading, deep shadows, rich blacks, 35mm. Empty room, no people.
